goal: You want to order 2 small strawberry juices (عصير فراولة صغير / small strawberry juice). When asked, your name is Sara, your delivery address is 'Salmiya, Block 4, Street 1, House 7', and you'll pay cash. Confirm the order when the shop summarises it correctly.
